title: Rocket Lab USA Inc (RKLB) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue Growth and Strategic...
text: Rocket Lab achieved remarkable growth in 2024, with annual revenue reaching $436 million, representing a 78% year-over-year increase. The fourth quarter alone generated $132 million in revenue, up 121% compared to the same period in 2023. The company's two main business segments both performed strongly. Launch Services revenue totaled $125.4 million for the full year (74% increase), while Space Systems generated $310.8 million (80% increase). Profitability metrics improved as well. GAAP gross margins reached 27.8% in Q4 and 26.6% annually, while non-GAAP margins climbed to 34% and 32% respectively. The company executed a record 16 launches in 2024 while maintaining a perfect 100% mission success rate. Additionally, Rocket Lab secured over $450 million in new contracts, boosting its backlog to $1.07 billion. Management expressed confidence in advancing the Neutron rocket program, though the timeline shifted to the second half of 2025. CEO Peter Beck stated the goal is to achieve orbit on the first flight, though acknowledged such an accomplishment would be challenging. For Q1 2025, the company guided for $117-$123 million in revenue with gross margins between 25-27% (GAAP) and 30-32% (non-GAAP). Management expects increased cash consumption due to Neutron investments.
